title: About Me
description: I'm a software engineer with a passion for creating beautiful and functional web experiences.
tldr: Front-end engineer focused on building performant, accessible web applications, design systems, and component libraries. I help clients deliver high-quality websites with exceptional user experience and measurable results.

content.paragraph: UX engineer specializing in building intuitive, performant user interfaces that enable content creation, support business goals, and streamline development workflows. Skilled in scaling design systems and guiding technical design decisions across complex web applications. Works cross-functionally with designers, product managers, and backend engineers to build accessible, reliable, and maintainable interfaces.

Expanding into AI-assisted product development and agent-driven systems through hands-on experimentation and cross-functional collaboration. Uses AI-assisted development workflows, including agents, reusable skills, and model selection, to accelerate iteration cycles and improve development efficiency. Stays hands-on with architecture, code review, and implementation while continuing to build expertise in AI-powered experiences.
